features: Approved by WRAS: Our premium filter is certified by WRAS for the compliance with the highest standards set out by water regulators in the UK.
Premium Coconut Carbon Block: Our selected coconut shell carbon block filter ensures highly-efficient filtration performance with micro-porous structure and multi-effect filtration technology.

Clean and Great Tasting: You can always get clean and great tasting water free from chlorine, taste and odor with our superior filter. Enjoy 4000 litres of crisp tasting water at a fraction of the price.
Easy to install requiring no tools: For detailed instruction, please kindly refer to the Instruction Manual in the box.
Compatible with: Lincat FC02 FilterFlow Automatic Water Boiler, 3M AP2-C401-SG, 47-915403, New style F series - EB3F, EB4F, EB6F, Burco ARK109.
description: Product Description Quality Water Makes a Difference The porous structure of premium coconut carbon block ensures high filtration efficiency A perfect alternative to the original without water leaks Provide you with fresh water at a cost-effective value AQU-WF02 Compatible with the Following Model Lincat FC02 FilterFlow Automatic Water Boiler 3M AP2-C401-SG, 47-915403 New style F series - EB3F, EB4F, EB6F, Burco ARK109. Please note this is a compatible spare part and the manufacturers' names and part numbers have been used for reference purposes only. AQUACREST is an independent brand. Recommended to replace your filter every 6 months or 1,060 gallons (4013 liters), whichever comes first Premium Filter Material Our filters adopted natural coconut shell activated carbon block with super strong adsorption capacity, preventing any health hazard to your body and giving you the wide range of protection. Premium Filtration Our premium filters can reduce chlorine, odour and taste, organic chemicals, suspended particles, as well as other potentially harmful water contaminants. Good Match Our filters adopt high technology so that can perfectly fit the original without water leaks and quite easy to install.
